     the Fermi energy is    -0.6052 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.60512122 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.9E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26631552 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6614.33880570 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -138600.98918908 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69955.35933905 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2721.70664739 Ry
